commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Paul adds that he has the Spirit of God in order to show that his advice is reliable. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Gregory The Dialogist
commentaries.content: "And I think also that I have the Spirit of God."

commentaries.author: Severian of Gabala
commentaries.content: What Paul means is that she is blessed if she marries and has a husband to protect her, but she is more blessed if, for the sake of piety, she refuses marriage and devotes herself entirely to God. .

commentaries.author: Shepherd of Hermas
commentaries.content: If a wife or a husband falls asleep and the one left marries again, is that a sin? No, but if he remains single he covers himself with greater honor and glory in the sight of the Lord.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
